[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A person is standing in front of a black car on a grassy roadside under an overcast sky.

The main subject is a person standing with one hand down and the other near their side in front of the front section of a black car. The person has short dark hair, a neutral expression, and is looking toward the camera. They wear a dark short-sleeve polo-style shirt, loose dark gray pants, and dark-and-white sneakers, with their legs slightly apart and their body turned slightly toward the car.

The setting is outdoors on uneven grass near a dirt-and-grass area, with rows of green trees and bushes in the background. The sky is cloudy and gray, and the lighting is soft and diffuse, suggesting daytime with overcast weather.

The car is positioned to the left of the person, with the front grille and headlights visible. A round emblem is visible in the center of the front grille. A license plate is mounted on the front bumper area; the plate shows the characters “INC” in large letters, with smaller text or numbers above or below that is unclear. The composition is a low-to-mid angle view, with the person framed from head to shoes and the car filling the left side of the image.

Visible Text:
INC

Practical Summary:
The image shows a person standing in front of the front of a black car outdoors. The background consists of trees and a cloudy sky.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):
# Extracted Text

No readable text is visible in the screenshot.

# Structured Version

- **Visible text:** None detected.

# Notes

- The image appears to be a photo of a person standing in front of a car in an outdoor setting.
- There is a small license plate/number area, but the characters are not clearly legible at this resolution, so I cannot extract them reliably.

Pertanyaan asli user: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young man with curly black hair, wearing a black polo shirt and baggy grey jeans, leans casually against the hood of a sleek, black BMW sedan. His hands are in his pockets, and he looks directly at the camera with a neutral expression. The car is parked on a grassy area, with lush green trees and a cloudy, overcast sky in the background. One prominent, bare, dead tree stands tall amidst the foliage on the right side of the frame. The lighting is soft and diffused due to the cloudy weather, creating a slightly muted color palette dominated by blacks, greys, and greens. The overall mood is relaxed and a bit moody. The image is captured from a medium-wide shot, with the car's front grille, headlights, and the license plate (showing "INC" in blue and white) clearly visible. The reflection of the trees can be seen on the car's shiny black surface. The grass is uneven and appears slightly damp.
